mapper.select: SELECT U.user_id, U.email, U.nickname, S.subject_name, L.grade_code, L.total_score, U.role, U.created_at, U.status, COALESCE(P.progress_count, 0) AS progress_count, COALESCE(P.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(P.average_progress_rate, 0) AS average_progress_rate FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(progress_id) AS progress_count, SUM( CASE WHEN lesson_completed = 1 OR practice_passed = 1 OR completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count, AVG(progress_rate) AS average_progress_rate FROM learning_progress GROUP BY user_id ) P ON U.user_id = P.user_id

SELECT U.user_id, U.email, U.nickname, S.subject_name, L.grade_code, L.total_score, U.role, U.created_at, U.status, COALESCE(P.progress_count, 0) AS progress_count, COALESCE(P.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(P.average_progress_rate, 0) AS average_progress_rate FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(progress_id) AS progress_count, SUM( CASE WHEN lesson_completed = 1 OR practice_passed = 1 OR completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count, AVG(progress_rate) AS average_progress_rate FROM learning_progress GROUP BY user_id ) P ON U.user_id = P.user_id
ORDER BY U.user_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id

SELECT U.user_id, U.email, U.nickname, S.subject_name, L.grade_code, L.total_score, U.role, U.created_at, U.status, COALESCE(P.progress_count, 0) AS progress_count, COALESCE(P.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(P.average_progress_rate, 0) AS average_progress_rate FROM users U LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(progress_id) AS progress_count, SUM( CASE WHEN lesson_completed = 1 OR practice_passed = 1 OR completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count, AVG(progress_rate) AS average_progress_rate FROM learning_progress GROUP BY user_id ) P ON U.user_id = P.user_id WHERE U.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT U.user_id, U.email, U.nickname, S.subject_name, L.grade_code, L.total_score, U.role, U.status, U.created_at,
COALESCE(P.progress_count, 0) AS progress_count, COALESCE(P.completed_count, 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(P.average_progress_rate, 0) AS average_progress_rate,
COALESCE(POSTS.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(COMMENTS.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, COALESCE(REPORTED.reported_count, 0) AS reported_count, COALESCE(RECEIVED.received_report_count, 0) AS received_report_count
FROM users U
LEFT JOIN user_learning_profiles L ON U.user_id = L.user_id
LEFT JOIN subjects S ON L.primary_subject_id = S.subject_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(progress_id) AS progress_count, SUM( CASE WHEN lesson_completed = 1 OR practice_passed = 1 OR completed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS completed_count, AVG(progress_rate) AS average_progress_rate FROM learning_progress GROUP BY user_id ) P ON U.user_id = P.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT writer_id, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM community_posts GROUP BY writer_id ) POSTS ON U.user_id = POSTS.writer_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT writer_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM comments GROUP BY writer_id ) COMMENTS ON U.user_id = COMMENTS.writer_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT reporter_id, COUNT(*) AS reported_count FROM reports GROUP BY reporter_id ) REPORTED ON U.user_id = REPORTED.reporter_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT target_writer_id, COUNT(*) AS received_report_count FROM ( SELECT P.writer_id AS target_writer_id FROM reports R JOIN community_posts P ON R.target_type = 'POST' AND R.target_id = P.post_id
UNION ALL
SELECT C.writer_id AS target_writer_id FROM reports R JOIN comments C ON R.target_type = 'COMMENT' AND R.target_id = C.comment_id ) REPORT_TARGETS GROUP BY target_writer_id ) RECEIVED ON U.user_id = RECEIVED.target_writer_id
WHERE U.user_id = #{userId}

where.if: AND ( U.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR U.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
